title: Azurite
description: Azurite is a mod that adds an ore called Azurite that can be used for weapons and tools.
body:
![i spelled it right this time :D](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fe73ba24e7f707a80356b1e370ec7c101d08751.png)

this is a mod inspired by [Amarite](https://modrinth.com/mod/amarite) and this mod is recommended to be used with BetterCombat and JEI (for the recipes).


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Azurite Greatsword

![cardboard holding azurite greatsword goes hard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b3e25497dc18de9e581e10aa817ae2c788e7204.png)

The Azurite Greatsword is a big powerful sword when it hits something a bar is charged the higher the bar goes the more damage it does, craftable using azurite, gold blocks, and a netherite sword (recipe below).

![the recipe for the azurite greatsword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92386e3d420b85ecbcd483730327b6a90f880a2a.png)
 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



# Azurite Tuning Fork

![cardboard holding the azurite tuning fork also goes hard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b620908140e38afcfd1fb73603a93b71685cd7e0_0.webp)

The Azurite Tuning Fork is tool crafted with azurite. When a block is held in the offhand and the Azurite Tuning Fork is used a Sound will play the volume and pitch of the sound will get higher deepending on the distance to the block in the offhand. the recipe of the Azurite Tuning Fork is listed below

![the recipe of the Azurite tuning fork](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa211c6f60c258febcfbe9f1a3d5661bdafa08a5.png)

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



# How to get Azurite

You can Convert diamond ore into azurite ore by placing it adjacent to a sculk catalyst and that sculk catalyst then blooming

![an Azurite Conversion Setup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/028df1dfb10155cf6bdcea31890641b9ae256ae3.png)
 
You can smelt Raw Azurite into Azurite Crystals inside of a furnace.
 
![raw azurite being smelted into azurite crystals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e932d7862f26d308075e2b6b69f019c90e1a1a0a.png)
